column3: "Celery lowers blood pressure" refers to its nutritious properties that can help regulate blood flow and decrease hypertension.
"Celery reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to minimize swelling and discomfort in body parts due to irritation or infection.
"Celery supports respiratory health" refers to its ability to promote proper lung function and reduce inflammation associated with respiratory issues.
"Celery promotes healthy digestion" refers to its ability to aid in smoothing gastrointestinal processes and enhancing overall food assimilation.

"Celery helps maintain a healthy weight" refers to its low-calorie content, high fiber and nutrient content, which together result in individuals feeling fuller without gaining more calories than they burn.
"Celery boosts heart health" refers to its ability to lower blood pressure and improve blood flow due to various nutrients it contains, ultimately benefiting cardiovascular well-being.

"Celery reduces stress levels" refers to its ability to contain nutrients and compounds that benefit mood regulation, thus potentially helping individuals cope better with stress and feel less anxious or tense.
"Celery improves brain function" refers to its effect on cognitive abilities by potentially boosting memory and concentration.
"Celery has antioxidant properties" refers to its ability to help protect cells from damage caused by harmful substances.
"Celery supports liver health" refers to its ability to promote the detoxifying and cleansing functions of the liver, leading to overall improvements in digestion and well-being.
